title: Humboltia pectinata
taxonomy: Humboltia pectinata is classified within the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume or bean family. This classification reflects the plant's characteristics and evolutionary relationships. The genus Humboltia is also part of the tribe Phaseoleae, which includes other legumes like beans and peas. Humboltia pectinata's classification is significant in understanding its ecological and economic roles.
